faq.description: Everything you need to know about Prozea.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

joinCall.question: How does Prozea join my call?
joinCall.answer: Prozea uses Recall.ai to join as a bot participant in Zoom, Google Meet, or Microsoft Teams. You simply share a meeting link or invite Prozea directly — it joins silently and begins real-time transcription.

dataSecurity.question: Is my client conversation data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: All transcription is processed in real-time and encrypted in transit and at rest. We never use your client data to train AI models. You own your data completely.

bpmnStandard.question: What BPMN standard do you support?
bpmnStandard.answer: Prozea generates BPMN 2.0 compliant diagrams. You can export and open them in any standards-compliant tool like Camunda, Signavio, or Visio.

liveEditing.question: Can I edit the diagram during the meeting?
liveEditing.answer: Yes. The BPMN canvas is fully interactive. You can move nodes, add annotations, confirm or reject AI suggestions, and refine the diagram while still on the call with your client.

aiAccuracy.question: What if the AI gets a process step wrong?
aiAccuracy.answer: Nodes appear in a 'forming' state first with a dashed border. You confirm, edit, or reject each step before it becomes permanent. You're always in control of the final deliverable.

hero.title: Turn every client meeting into a finished process map
hero.subtitle: Prozea joins your video call, guides your questions with an AI teleprompter, and auto-diagrams business processes in real-time. Walk out of every meeting with a client-ready BPMN deliverable.

problem.title: Process consultants are drowning in documentation

stat1.label: of consulting time spent on post-meeting documentation

stat2.label: average time to reconstruct one process map from notes

stat3.label: of process steps missed or misremembered

problem.description: You take notes during the call. You ask the client to repeat things. You spend hours afterward in Visio or Lucidchart reconstructing what was said. Steps get missed. Details get lost. Your client gets a deliverable days later instead of minutes.

step1.title: Prozea joins your call
step1.description: Invite Prozea to any Zoom, Teams, or Meet session. It joins as a silent participant and begins real-time transcription with speaker identification.

step2.title: AI guides your questions
step2.description: A private teleprompter shows you exactly what to ask next, based on what's been discussed. Never miss a critical process step again.

step3.title: Diagram builds itself
step3.description: Watch as BPMN tasks, gateways, and flows appear on the canvas in real-time. Review and refine with your client while still on the call.

features.title: Everything you need to elicit processes, not document them
features.description: Prozea handles the documentation so you can focus on what you do best — understanding your client's business.

feature1.title: Real-Time Transcription
feature1.subtitle: Every word captured, every speaker identified.
feature1.description: Powered by Deepgram, Prozea captures every word with speaker diarization. Know exactly who said what, so your process map reflects the right roles and responsibilities.

benefit1.title: Speaker Diarization
benefit1.description: Automatically identifies who is speaking, mapping voices to roles in your process diagram.

benefit2.title: Multi-Language Support
benefit2.description: Transcribe meetings in multiple languages with high accuracy and low latency.

benefit3.title: Searchable History
benefit3.description: Every transcript is saved and searchable. Revisit any moment from any past session.

feature2.title: AI Teleprompter
feature2.subtitle: Your expert co-pilot for every meeting.
feature2.description: Claude analyzes the conversation in real-time and surfaces the next question you should ask. Covers edge cases, exception flows, and handoffs that consultants typically miss.

benefit1.title: Context-Aware Questions
benefit1.description: Questions adapt based on what's been discussed. No generic scripts — every prompt is tailored to the conversation.

benefit2.title: Gap Detection
benefit2.description: Identifies missing information — exception paths, approval chains, handoff points — before the meeting ends.

benefit3.title: Private to You
benefit3.description: The teleprompter is your private view. Your client sees nothing — just a consultant asking brilliant questions.

feature3.title: Live BPMN Diagramming
feature3.subtitle: Process maps that draw themselves.
feature3.description: Tasks, gateways, events, and swim lanes appear as the conversation unfolds. BPMN 2.0 compliant and ready to export the moment your meeting ends.

benefit1.title: BPMN 2.0 Standard
benefit1.description: Industry-standard notation that opens in Camunda, Signavio, Visio, and any compliant tool.

benefit2.title: Real-Time Collaboration
benefit2.description: Share the diagram canvas with your client during the call. Build the process together.

benefit3.title: Confirm & Reject
benefit3.description: Every AI-generated node starts as a suggestion. You decide what stays and what goes.

demo.q5: How long does each step take?
demo.t1: Walk me through what happens after a purchase order is submitted.
demo.t2: It goes to the department manager for approval first.
demo.t3: If it's over $5,000, it also needs VP sign-off.
demo.t4: What happens if the VP rejects it?
demo.t5: It goes back to the requestor with notes for revision.
demo.t6: And once the revision is submitted, it starts the approval cycle again?
demo.t7: Exactly. It loops back through the same process.
demo.q7: Who gets notified at each stage?

scene5.title: Walk out with a deliverable
scene5.after: Now: Done before the meeting ends
